questions.title: 1. Split Squat - Knee in Line with Foot
questions.instructions: From a standing position, step one leg back into a split squat. Lower with control, keeping your front knee in line with your toes.
questions.prompt: What did you notice during the reps?

options.label: A
options.text: My knee tracked well and movement felt strong and controlled.

options.label: B
options.text: Slight wobble or instability, but I managed the movement.

options.label: C
options.text: My knee collapsed inward or I felt off balance/pain.

questions.title: 2. Hollow Body Hold - 20 Seconds
questions.instructions: Lie on your back, arms and legs extended off the floor, lower back pressed into the ground. Hold this position for 20 seconds.

options.label: A
options.text: I held the full 20 seconds with tight core and flat lower back.

options.label: B
options.text: I held it but had to adjust or felt my lower back lift off.

options.label: C
options.text: I couldn't hold for the full 20 seconds or felt discomfort in my back.

questions.title: 3. Wall Backbend - 1 Foot from the Wall
questions.instructions: Stand one foot away from a wall. Reach back slowly to place your hands on the wall and open your chest. You should feel the stretch in the spine and shoulders.

options.label: A
options.text: I reached the wall comfortably and felt a good, controlled stretch.

options.label: B
options.text: I reached the wall but felt stiff or struggled to control the descent.

options.label: C
options.text: I couldn't reach the wall or had pain/discomfort in shoulders or back.

questions.title: 4. 90/90 Transitions - No Hands
questions.instructions: Sit in a 90/90 position and rotate your knees side to side into the opposite 90/90 without using your hands.

options.label: A
options.text: I moved side to side smoothly with no hand support.

options.label: B
options.text: I used my hands slightly or had minor difficulty.

options.label: C
options.text: I couldn't do the transitions without support or had hip tightness/pain.

questions.title: 5. Side Plank - Elbow or Straight Arm, 30 Seconds
questions.instructions: Hold a side plank position for 30 seconds on each side. Choose either elbow or straight-arm position.

options.label: A
options.text: I held both sides with no drop or pain.

options.label: B
options.text: I held it but felt shaky or slightly dipped my hips.

options.label: C
options.text: I couldn't hold for 30 seconds or had discomfort in shoulders/core.

questions.title: 6. 5x Knee Push-ups - Nose to Floor
questions.instructions: From a kneeling position, do 5 slow and controlled push-ups, lowering your nose all the way to the floor each time.
questions.prompt: How was your form and strength?

options.label: A
options.text: I did all 5 with full range, good control, and no pain.

options.label: B
options.text: I completed them but struggled with depth or form.

options.label: C
options.text: I couldn't do all 5 reps or felt pain in my shoulders/core.

pass.title:
🥳 🎉 🥳 🎉 Congratulations 🥳 🎉 🥳 🎉

✅ AMS | ReBuild™ - PASSED!
pass.body:
Great stuff. You've passed the ReBuild Assessment. That means you've built enough foundation to take on the next level of strength, control, and mobility.

👉 Next step:
If you managed all exercises with ease then I would highly recommend that you try the AMS | Prime™ assessment quiz next and see where you land.

fail.title: 🟢 Recommended Level: AMS | ReBuild™
fail.body:
Your movement assessment shows that AMS | ReBuild™ is the right level for you. Aim to challenge yourself through the program.

This phase is about laying the right groundwork: building balance, control, and the foundational strength you can rely on as you progress up the chain.
